text:
I'm truly sorry for what I said — or didn't say, or did without thinking. I've been sitting with this, turning it over, and I realize now how careless I was with something that mattered to you. That wasn't fair.

I don't want to make excuses. Whatever was going on with me at the time doesn't change the fact that you were hurt, and that hurt came from me. I wish I could take it back. Since I can't, I at least want you to know that I see it, and I'm not brushing past it.

You deserve better from me. I think you already know I care about you, but caring about someone isn't enough if you're not also careful with them. I want to be more careful. I want to be the kind of person you can trust not to make you feel small or overlooked or wounded.

If you need time, I understand. I'm not asking you to forgive me right now or to pretend everything is fine. I just wanted you to hear, plainly and without any conditions attached, that I'm sorry. Really sorry.

I'm here whenever you're ready to talk.
